[[Trade Baron]] '''Mik Regrap''' was a [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] financial officer who served as [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Lott Dod/Legends|Lott Dod's]] [[Advisor/Legends|advisor]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

==Biography==
[[File:TF_Senate.png|thumb|left|200px|Mik Regrap, Lott Dod, and Lufa Danak in the Galactic Senate]]
A [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] financial officer,<ref name="Visual Dictionary">''[[Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> [[Trade Baron]]<ref name="Novelization">[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' novelization]]</ref> Mik Regrap<ref name="Rogues Gallery" /> served as [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Lott Dod/Legends|Lott Dod's]]<ref name="The Phantom Menace" /> [[Advisor/Legends|advisor]]<ref name="Neimoidian Advisor">{{YJCCG|set=Battle of Naboo|cardname=Neimoidian Advisor|link=battleofnaboo/dark/large/107neimoidianadvisorbureau.html}}</ref> in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]].<ref name="The Phantom Menace" /> In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="Essential Reader's Companion">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> she was present in Dod's [[Repulsorpod/Legends|repulsorpod]] alongside him and<ref name="The Phantom Menace" /> his [[Aide/Legends|aide]],<ref name="Neimoidian Aide">{{YJCCG|set=The Jedi Council|cardname=Neimoidian Aide|link=thejedicouncil/dark/images/104neimoidianaidetrade.gif}}</ref> [[Lufa Danak/Legends|Lufa Danak]],<ref name="Rogues Gallery" /> when Senator [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] accused the Trade Federation of [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invading]] their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].<ref name="The Phantom Menace" />

==Personality and traits==
As a mathematician, Mik Regrap would always find the most profitable way to deal with parliamentary motions. A [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]],<ref name="Rogues Gallery" /> she had [[Color/Legends|green]] skin and red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="The Phantom Menace" />

==Equipment==
Regrap wore a light gray<ref name="The Phantom Menace" /> financial officer's collar<ref name="Visual Dictionary" /> over her dark blue and light gray [[Robe/Legends|robe]], as well as a dark gray hat.<ref name="The Phantom Menace" />

==Behind the scenes==
Originally created for<ref name="100INTGP">{{YouTube|video=6fevC0IluiY|text=Gary Pollard - Creature Sculptor SW Ep 1 - FORCEMANIA (2023)|channel=Forcemania|name=Forcemania|date=2025-12-09|archivedate=20250716173054}}</ref> the [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']],<ref name="The Phantom Menace" /> where the character's mask was sculpted by [[Gary Pollard]],<ref name="100INTGP" /> Mik Regrap first appeared in its [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|novelization]] by [[Terry Brooks]], where she was referred to simply as a "trade baron."<ref name="Novelization" /> The novelization was published on [[April 21]], [[1999]], before the film's release on [[May 19]], 1999.<ref name="Year">''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle]]''</ref> She was first identified in ''[[Dressing a Galaxy: The Costumes of Star Wars]]'', a [[2005]] reference book by [[Trisha Biggar]].<ref name="Dressing a Galaxy">''[[Dressing a Galaxy: The Costumes of Star Wars]]''</ref>
